title: Minecraft Aesthetics
description: Performance improved vanilla minecraft with beautiful shaders.
body:
##
Minecraft Aesthetics is a vanilla modpack that ***immensely improves FPS*** and makes Minecraft look its best, with ***preinstalled shaders*** included.
##




Optimize your gaming experience with mods designed to ***minimize lag, reduce load times, and enhance overall performance***. Say goodbye to interruptions and hello to a ***smooth, immersive*** journey through the Minecraft universe.

Immerse yourself in an ***aesthetically pleasing environment*** as you explore a world transformed by stunning visual enhancements. ***Dynamic lighting, vibrant textures, and improved rendering techniques*** come together to create a Minecraft experience that is as visually impressive as it is ***performance-optimized.*** 
##
![Village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2mGLIoLk/images/05859d99e6900437bbe42bfbabdba0cffcf2d2cc.png)
It also includes a variety of ***Quality of Life*** changes that make the game more user-friendly and enjoyable. For example, the modpack includes mods that allow you to see information about blocks and items without having to open your inventory, and mods that provide you with helpful information about the world around you.
##
